seo.title: Services | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's Private Registry, Success Plan, Premium Search and Private Circle options. By application, not by payment.

hero.title: Choose the level of support you need.
hero.description: Some families want a quiet, free listing. Others want Gopi Shah and Alpa Apoorva personally involved from the first conversation. Every tier is by application - not by payment alone.

tiers.label: 01 · Profile submission
tiers.title: Private Registry
tiers.description: Free and entirely private. We do not search on your behalf, but if a retained family is a genuine fit, you will hear from us.
features: Private review by the HeartLink team
Contacted only if there is a real fit

tiers.label: 02 · Success based
tiers.title: Success Plan
tiers.description: No registration fee and no advisory fee. HeartLink is paid only when the match succeeds, and we take this on only when we believe we can help.

tiers.label: 03 · Active search
tiers.title: Premium Search
tiers.description: A retained, application-based search where Gopi Shah and the team work your mandate personally.
features: Part of the 50 active mandate limit, combined

tiers.label: 04 · Highest touch
tiers.title: Private Circle
tiers.description: Our most private engagement, for families who need an even narrower circle than Premium Search provides.
features: Not shown within retained searches without explicit permission

protocol.title: Exclusive does not mean complicated.
paragraphs: The Registry Network can grow widely, but Premium Search and Private Circle remain intentionally limited.

HeartLink accepts a maximum of 50 active mandates at one time across Premium Search and Private Circle, combined. Acceptance, terms and service level are discussed only after we understand your family and requirements.

process.title: A simple process with careful checks.
process.description: HeartLink keeps the search private, selective and family-focused from the first meeting to the final decision.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Private Meeting
steps.description: We speak with the family and understand the person, background, preferences and expectations.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Profile Review
steps.description: We review education, work, family details, values, lifestyle and long-term compatibility.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Background Checks
steps.description: We use personal references, social and professional review, conversations and direct checks before moving forward.

steps.label: Step 04
steps.title: Selected Introductions
steps.description: Only considered profiles are shared. There is no public browsing and no random matching.

steps.label: Step 05
steps.title: Family Discussion
steps.description: When both sides are interested, we help the families speak clearly and respectfully.

steps.label: Step 06
steps.title: Compatibility Guidance
steps.description: We help the couple and families understand expectations before taking the next step.

steps.label: Step 07
steps.title: Support After Commitment
steps.description: When needed, HeartLink can continue guidance through engagement and early married life.

afterSubmit.title: What happens after your application.
afterSubmit.description: A private review helps us guide each family to the right next step.

cards.title: Private review
cards.description: The HeartLink team reviews the enquiry and basic profile details privately.

cards.title: Follow-up
cards.description: If we can help, a team member may contact the family representative for more context.

cards.title: Fit discussion
cards.description: We understand expectations, privacy needs and which service option may suit the family.

cards.title: Next-step recommendation
cards.description: HeartLink recommends Private Registry, Success Plan, Premium Search or Private Circle where appropriate.

closing.quote: Tell us what you are looking for. We will guide you to the right level of support.
